sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6462" key="a)nadixo/tomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναδιχότομος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φάσις</foreign> <sense id="n6462.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">last quarter</tr_> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).205</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
